description: Composition Olive green and beige hand block print kurta made of a cotton fabric, has a mandarin collar, buttoned chest placket, long sleeves and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using mild detergent Dry in shade Do not soak This unique fabric has been dyed/ printed using traditional dyeing processes. Some colours may initially transfer when in dry or wet contact with light coloured fabrics or upholstery. This transfer will reduce after a few washes but we recommend that you wash the product separately for the first few washes. fabindia specialises in natural, craft-based contemporary pieces, while also providing rural crafts persons a platform to use traditional dyeing and fabric printing techniques. With the essence of Indian roots, crafted with a focus on the traditional, this kurta sets the tone for an all-new trend for men. Wear this with denims or fitted churidars. Model statistics The product is a a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
